summary: Comprehensive testing of BM Hospitality travel services website completed. All 5 backend APIs pass (12/12 tests). All frontend UI components and form integrations verified working correctly.

issues: Minor accessibility warning: DialogContent missing DialogTitle for screen readers (console warning only, does not affect functionality)

critical_code_review_comments: All forms properly connected to backend APIs instead of WhatsApp - verified working
No MakeMyTrip references or +500/+2000 markup text in Flight Inquiry section - verified clean
Hotels & Resorts form has email and WhatsApp fields as required
Offers & Deals section uses olive green (#6b7c3e / rgb(107, 124, 62)) color scheme correctly
Logo displays with transparent background handling (mix-blend-mode: multiply)
Instagram link in header top-left bar points to correct URL

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI components and form integrations verified)

seed_data_creation: Test data created via API tests with TEST_ prefix (newsletter subscriptions, flight inquiries, hotel inquiries, contacts, quick inquiries)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 backend APIs verified working: /api/subscribe, /api/flight-inquiry, /api/hotel-inquiry, /api/contact, /api/inquiry. All frontend forms connected properly to these APIs. Newsletter popup appears after 2 seconds (can be closed). Local storage key 'bm_hospitality_subscribed' is set after successful newsletter subscription.

features_verified.logo_no_white_background: PASS - Uses transparent background with mix-blend-mode: multiply
features_verified.hotels_email_whatsapp_fields: PASS - Both fields present and working
features_verified.offers_olive_green_color: PASS - Uses #6b7c3e (rgb(107, 124, 62)) for badges and buttons
